news.headline: Benson & Bingham wins $30M settlement in landmark premises liability case in Las Vegas, led by Joseph L. Benson II, Esq.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on March 13, 2025, Benson & Bingham Accident Injury Lawyers achieved a favorable resolution in a premises liability case amounting to $30 million. Joseph L. Benson II, Esq. spearheaded the case, showcasing the firm's commitment to advocating for injury victims and ensuring accountability for negligent property owners.

US Secretary of State Rubio: There has not been enough progress on the issue of drug trafficking.
Redwood Trust (NYSE: RWT) declares $0.18/share common dividend for Q1 2025. Leader in housing access.
news.summary: In Mill Valley, California, Redwood Trust, Inc. (NYSE: RWT) declared first quarter 2025 dividends for common and preferred stocks. For common shares, a dividend of $0.18 per share was announced by the Board of Directors, consistent with the previous quarter. Redwood continues to facilitate housing access for homebuyers and renters as a leading company in the industry.

news.headline: Urban Edge Properties to host first quarter 2025 earnings conference call.
news.summary: Urban Edge Properties is extending an invitation for individuals to participate in its upcoming first quarter 2025 earnings conference call happening in New York. The call is aimed at discussing the financial results of the company for the mentioned period. Those interested are encouraged to join the call to gain insights into the figures and performance of Urban Edge Properties during the stated timeframe.

news.headline: TWO introduces video series for conversations.
Champion Homes appoints Mary B. Fedewa to its Board of Directors, making a total of 8 directors, 7 independent.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan, Champion Homes, Inc. (NYSE: SKY) declared the appointment of Mary B. Fedewa as a new independent director, increasing their Board to eight directors, with seven being independent. With over 30 years of experience in finance and capital markets, Ms. Fedewa is a prominent figure in the real estate sector. She was the co-founder of STORE Capital.

news.headline: UDR Inc. declares $0.43/share quarterly dividend for Q1 of 2025, payable on April 30, marking 210 consecutive payouts.
news.summary: UDR, Inc., a prominent multifamily real estate investment trust listed as UDR on the New York Stock Exchange, has reported that its Board of Directors has approved a regular quarterly dividend for the first quarter of 2025. The dividend is set at $0.43 per share and will be disbursed in cash on April 30, 2025, to shareholders of UDR common stock recorded as of April 10, 2025. This upcoming dividend payment on April 30, 2025, will mark the 210th consecutive quarterly dividend distributed by the Company to its common stockholders.

news.headline: Operation HOPE celebrates one year of The HOPE Insider survey, with data from 2024 Q4, providing insight on low-income Americans.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Operation HOPE, a nonprofit aiding low- and moderate-income individuals in navigating the economy, unveiled the 2024 Annual Report of its widespread client survey, The HOPE Insider. This marks a year since the quarterly survey began in November 2023. The Annual Report, encompassing data up to the fourth quarter of 2024, presents a comprehensive overview based on insights gathered from thousands of participants throughout the year. Operation HOPE continues its commitment to empowering Americans economically.

news.headline: BrightView plans $100 million share repurchase program to enhance business growth and shareholder value.
news.summary: BrightView Holdings, Inc., a prominent commercial landscaping services company in the US, based in Blue Bell, Pennsylvania, declared that its Board of Directors has approved a share repurchase plan of $100 million. This move aims to enable continuous investment in the company while maintaining a balanced level of debt and allowing for strategic share buybacks. The decision is in line with the company's commitment to effectively utilizing capital and steering the growth of the business.

news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Pangaea Logistics Solutions Ltd. (NASDAQ: PANL), a leading global maritime logistics company, disclosed its financial performance for the last quarter and the full year ending on December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter...

news.headline: ALTA praises Senate for confirming Bill Pulte as new FHFA director. Bill Pulte will lead Federal Housing Finance Agency.
news.summary: In a statement released on March 13, 2025, the American Land Title Association (ALTA) praised the U.S. Senate for officially appointing Bill Pulte as the latest director of the Federal Housing Finance Agency (FHFA). This move signifies a significant development in the land title insurance sector, as Pulte steps into his new role at the helm of the FHFA.

news.headline: Titan Machinery Inc. will report Q4 and full year 2025 results on March 20, 2025. Investor call at 7:30 a.m. Central time.
news.summary: Today, in West Fargo, North Dakota, Titan Machinery Inc. (Nasdaq: TITN), a prominent chain of full-service agricultural and construction equipment stores, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on January 31, 2025, on Thursday, March 20, 2025. This will be accompanied by an investor conference call at 7:30 a.m. CT (8:30 a.m. ET).

news.headline: Portman Ridge Finance Corp. reported FY2024 net investment income of $2.59 per share. They repurchased 202,357 shares for $3.8 million during the year. They declared a quarterly base distribution of $0.47 per share for Q1 2025. The company announced a merger agreement with Logan Ridge. Total investment income for FY2024 was $62.4 million. NAV was $178.5 million as of Dec 31, 2024. Total shares repurchased were 202,357 in 2024. They entered into a merger agreement with Logan Ridge on Jan 29, 2025. The Board authorized a stock repurchase program of $10 million on Mar 12, 2025. They declared a base distribution of $0.47 per share and a supplemental distribution of $0.07 per share on Mar 13, 2025. Total investment portfolio at fair value was $405.0 million as of Dec 31, 2024, comprising 93 portfolio companies. Total stockholder distributions for 2024 amount to $2.76 per share. Management remains confident in their investment strategy and ability to drive long-term value for shareholders.
news.summary: Portman Ridge Finance Corporation reported net investment income of $2.59 per share for full year 2024 and a net asset value of $19.41 per share. They repurchased 202,357 shares totaling approximately $3.8 million in 2024. They announced a regular quarterly base distribution of $0.47 per share and a supplemental distribution of $0.07 per share for the first quarter of 2025. The company also revealed a merger agreement with Logan Ridge to enhance shareholder value. Financial highlights for the full year 2024 included total investment income of $62.4 million, core investment income of $62.2 million, and net investment income of $24.0 million. The company also plans a renewed stock repurchase program and introduced a new dividend policy for sustainable distributions across market cycles. CEO Ted Goldthorpe expressed optimism about the merger and future prospects.

news.headline: Zayo to acquire Crown Castle's Fiber Solutions business for $4.25 billion, focusing on critical fiber infrastructure for AI growth.
news.summary: Zayo, a prominent communications infrastructure provider supported by DigitalBridge and EQT, recently revealed its acquisition of Crown Castle’s Fiber Solutions business for about $4.25 billion. This move demonstrates Zayo’s commitment to enhancing its fiber infrastructure to facilitate the expansion of artificial intelligence (AI) throughout the United States and boost economic activity.

news.headline: Williams COO Michael Dunn to retire on May 2, 2025 after transforming the organization into a cohesive operating company.
news.summary: TULSA, Oklahoma - In a recent development, Williams (NYSE: WMB) has disclosed that Micheal Dunn, their executive vice president and chief operating officer, is set to retire on May 2, 2025. The President and CEO of Williams, Alan Armstrong, commended Dunn for his instrumental role in unifying the organization's operations into a top-performing entity. Under Dunn's leadership, the company transitioned from separate business units to a cohesive operational structure, emphasizing operational excellence and a strong safety ethos throughout. Armstrong expressed gratitude for Dunn's contributions to Williams' success.

news.headline: TechnipFMC CEO to speak at Piper Sandler 25th Annual Energy Conference in Las Vegas on March 18, 2025 at 8:30 a.m. PT. Webcast available.
news.summary: TechnipFMC (NYSE: FTI) revealed that Doug Pferdehirt, the Chair and CEO, is scheduled to address attendees at the upcoming Piper Sandler 25th Annual Energy Conference on March 18, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. PT in Las Vegas, Nevada. The presentation will be live-streamed on the Investor Relations website at the specified time, with no accompanying presentation materials provided. Following the event, an audio replay of the webcast will be accessible on the platform for those interested.

news.headline: Wall Street bullish Ed Yardeni cuts S&P 500 targets due to Trump's tariff threats. Best-case now 6,400 by 2025, worst case 5,800.
news.summary: One of the prominent Wall Street analysts, Ed Yardeni, known for his bullish stance, has revised his year-end price targets due to escalating risks from President Trump's tariff policies. Yardeni has adjusted his S&P 500 best-case target from 7,000 to 6,400 for the end of 2025 and from 8,000 to 7,200 for 2026. In his worst-case scenario, he predicts the index could plummet to 5,800 by the close of 2025 and 6,500 by the end of 2026. Yardeni's initial optimism has shifted, reflecting a more cautious approach as he now foresees potential challenges ahead in the market. Earlier, he had envisioned an 18% surge in the S&P 500 to reach 7,000 by the close of 2025, aligned with projections from Wells Fargo and Deutsche Bank, while Oppenheimer Asset Management had set a more ambitious 7,100 target.

news.headline: 21Shares will liquidate two bitcoin and ethereum futures ETFs as part of routine review of their product lineup.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, 21Shares US LLC, an affiliate of 21Shares AG, a leading issuer of crypto exchange traded funds (ETFs), revealed the planned liquidation of two bitcoin futures and ethereum futures ETFs. This decision came after a routine assessment of the company’s product portfolio to guarantee its relevance to market trends, client requirements, and the evolving digital assets environment.

news.headline: Logan Ridge Finance Corp. reports Q4 2024 net investment income at $0.56 per share & net asset value at $32.04 per share.
news.summary: The company has released impressive financial results for the fourth quarter, showing a net investment income of $0.56 per share. Additionally, the net asset value per share stands at $32.04. Investors can take note of these strong numbers as indicators of the company's performance during this time period.

news.headline: Portman Ridge Finance Corp. reveals $2.59 net investment income per share and $19.41 net asset value per share for 2024.
news.summary: In the full year of 2024, the organization disclosed a net investment income of $2.59 per share. Additionally, they reported a net asset value of $19.41 per share.

news.headline: Las Vegas Aces partner with Scripps Sports to air regular season games on Vegas 34. Multiyear agreement signed.
news.summary: In a recent development on March 13, 2025, the Las Vegas Aces and Scripps Sports have officially inked a long-term deal designating Vegas 34 as the exclusive broadcast platform for the two-time consecutive WNBA champions for the 2022-2023 seasons. As per the newly forged agreement, Scripps Sports is set to air all games and related content.

news.headline: US Secretary of State Rubio: We have seen a level of cooperation from the Mexican authorities that we have never seen in the past, but it is not enough.
PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH) reported four-fold revenue growth in 2024, emphasizing core merchants & consumers engagement.
news.summary: PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH), known as PublicSquare, based in West Palm Beach, Florida, released its financial results for Q4 2024 and FY 2024. The company, a prominent commerce and payments ecosystem in the U.S., prioritizes values like life, family, and liberty. According to Michael Seifert, the Chairman and CEO, the year 2024 saw substantial achievements as they concentrated on involving their primary merchants and consumers, leading to a four-fold increase in revenue.

news.headline: Crown Castle sells fiber segment for $8.5 billion to EQT and Zayo, reports Q4 and FY 2024 results, and outlines full-year 2025 outlook.
news.summary: Completes strategic assessment with a deal to vend small cell technology and fiber solutions for a total of $8.5 billion.

news.headline: Turtle Beach Corp reports record Q4 and full year 2024 results, setting new benchmarks in financial performance.
news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by 3.2% this year, down from the previous estimate of 3.6%. The decrease is attributed to ongoing trade tensions and geopolitical uncertainties. It is projected that advanced economies will grow at a rate of 1.7%, while emerging market and developing economies will see a growth rate of 4.1%. Additionally, global trade is expected to expand by 1.1% this year, a sharp decline from the 3.6% growth recorded last year. These economic developments are causing concerns among policymakers and analysts about the stability and future growth of the global economy.

news.headline: HeartSciences reports third quarter fiscal 2025 results; AI medical tech company focused on transforming ECGs for early heart disease detection.
news.summary: In Southlake, TX, on March 13, 2025, HeartSciences Inc. (Nasdaq: HSCS; HSCSW) released their financial report for the third quarter fiscal 2025 ending January 31, 2025. The company, specializing in AI-powered medical technology to enhance early detection of heart disease through ECGs/EKGs, shared updates on their business performance. This quarter's results indicated the company's progress in their mission to save lives through advanced cardiac health solutions.

news.headline: Candel Therapeutics (Nasdaq: CADL) reports Q4 & full year 2024 financial results and corporate highlights in recent update.
news.summary: Candel Therapeutics, Inc., based in NEEDHAM, Mass., revealed their financial results for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, known as Candel (Nasdaq: CADL), concentrates on creating multimodal biological immunotherapies to aid cancer patients. Additionally, they shared a corporate update along with this information.

news.headline: Tech company releases Q4 & FY 2025 results.
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The economy has seen a significant increase in job creation with over 300,000 new jobs added in the last quarter alone. This positive trend has led to growth in various sectors including technology, healthcare, and manufacturing. Experts are optimistic about the future outlook of the job market and the overall economy as a result of these recent improvements.

news.headline: ZimVie Inc to make changes in Board of Directors; a global leader in dental implant market.
news.summary: In Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, on March 13, 2025, ZimVie Inc. (Nasdaq: ZIMV), a prominent player in the dental implant market worldwide, revealed plans for alterations within its Board of Directors.

news.headline: Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. (NASDAQ: LIEN) reveals Q4 2024 financial results in upcoming conference call.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, Chicago Atlantic BDC, Inc. disclosed its financial results for the fourth quarter and year ending December 31, 2024. The Company, trading under the ticker symbol NASDAQ: LIEN, functions as a specialty finance entity opting for regulation as a business development company. The announcement was made in New York.

news.headline: Preformed Line Products reported Q4 2024 net sales of $167.1 million, up 15% from previous quarter.
news.summary: In Cleveland on March 13, 2025, Preformed Line Products Company (NASDAQ: PLPC) announced its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 and the entire year ending December 31, 2024. Key highlights for Q4/Full Year 2024 include quarterly net sales reaching $167.1 million, marking a notable 15% growth from the previous quarter.

news.headline: Starwood Property Trust (NYSE: STWD) declares $0.48 per share dividend for Q1 2025, payable March 31.  Character Count: 88
news.summary: In Miami Beach, Florida, on March 13, 2025, Starwood Property Trust, Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.48 per share of common stock for the period ending March 31, 2025. This announcement was made by the Company's Board of Directors. The dividend will be paid out to shareholders.

news.headline: BlackRock's BUIDL fund, tokenized by Securitize, exceeds $1B in assets under management, signaling a groundbreaking achievement.
news.summary: Securitize, a leading player in tokenization, has reached a significant industry achievement by successfully pushing forward the utilization of digital assets among institutions. In a recent announcement on March 13, 2025, it was revealed that the BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL) has exceeded $1 billion in total assets under management, solidifying its position in the market. This milestone underscores Securitize's dedication to revolutionizing digital asset adoption within the institutional sector.

news.headline: Bank of America declares dividends on preferred stock for April and May 2025 in Charlotte.
news.summary: Bank of America Corporation has declared regular cash dividends for their preferred stock series. The Board of Directors approved the payout for the outstanding shares or depositary shares. The announcement was made on March 13, 2025, in Charlotte, North Carolina. The dividends per share will vary based on the specific series of preferred stock. This move signals the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

news.headline: Northwest Pipe Company starts Community Impact Program, donates to Share Vancouver's Backpack Program. #NWPX #CSR
news.summary: Northwest Pipe Company, a major manufacturer of water-related infrastructure listed on Nasdaq as NWPX, has introduced its Community Impact Program by making a donation to Share Vancouver's Backpack Program in Vancouver, Washington. The initiative commenced on March 13, 2025. This program aims to support the local community through various outreach efforts.

news.headline: NextPlat reschedules 2024 financial results report and investor call to March 24, 2025 from March 13, 2025. (Total characters: 108)
news.summary: The global e-Commerce provider, NextPlat Corp (NASDAQ: NXPL, NXPLW), based in Coconut Grove, Florida, has announced the rescheduling of its financial results release for the full-year ending December 31, 2024. The new release date will be before the market opens.

news.headline: Drilling Tools Int'l Corp. reports Q4 and 2024 year-end results. Expects growth in 2025, with significant revenue increase internationally.
news.summary: Anticipating further expansion in 2025, Drilling Tools International Corp. (NASDAQ: DTI) estimates growth in consolidated revenue, adjusted EBITDA, and adjusted free cash flow. The company expects a substantial increase in international revenue in 2025. Based in Houston, as of March 13, 2025, DTI is poised to see significant progress in various financial aspects in the upcoming year.

news.headline: Hyperliquid boosts margin requirements post $4M loss in liquidation. Traders need 20% collateral from March 15. $350M TLV in HLP.
news.summary: Hyperliquid, a popular platform for leveraged perpetual trading, recently faced a $4 million loss in its liquidity pool due to a trader liquidating a $200 million Ether long position. As a response, Hyperliquid has increased margin requirements, requiring traders to maintain a collateral margin of at least 20% on certain positions starting March 15. Despite the incident not being an exploit, Hyperliquid sees it as an opportunity to strengthen their margining framework. The platform has a liquidity pool with over $350 million in Total Value Locked (TVL) and has captured 70% of the market share in the perps exchange, with a daily transaction volume of around $180 million as of March 12. The platform boasts fast settlement times and low fees but is less decentralized than other exchanges.

news.headline: Plymouth Industrial REIT appoints Robert O. Stephenson to the Board of Directors as an independent member effective March 13, 2025.
news.summary: In Boston, on March 13, 2025, Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. declared the addition of Robert O. Stephenson to its Board of Directors. Stephenson, an independent director, will also join the Audit Committee of the company. Plymouth Industrial REIT, Inc. is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol PLYM.

news.headline: Innventure, Inc. (Nasdaq: INV) to attend 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17, 2025 in Newport Beach, California. CEO and CIO to attend.
news.summary: Innventure, Inc. (Nasdaq: INV), a technology commercialization platform based in Orlando, Florida, revealed that CEO Bill Haskell and CIO Lucas Harper will participate in the 37th Annual Roth Conference on March 17, 2025, in Newport Beach, California. This presents an opportunity for investor interactions.

news.headline: President Trump escalates trade threats, risking trade wars with allies as he issues new retaliatory measures.
news.summary: As tensions rise due to trade disputes, the president is escalating the situation by issuing fresh threats in an attempt to compel trading partners to cease retaliatory actions. This could potentially lead to a spiraling effect in trade conflicts with allies. The president's strategy involves employing new tactics in trade negotiations to pressure partners into backing down from retaliation measures. The situation is precarious as both sides are engaging in a tit-for-tat approach, with increasing threats and counter-threats. This escalation comes amidst escalating trade tensions, with the impact felt globally. As the trade war heats up, there is a growing concern over the potential economic repercussions, with trade numbers being significantly affected.

news.headline: NCS Multistage Holdings CEO to present at Emerging Growth Conference on March 27, 2025 at 11:35 a.m. CT.
news.summary: In Houston on March 13, 2025, NCS Multistage Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:NCSM) shared news that CEO Ryan Hummer will speak at the Emerging Growth Conference on March 27, 2025. The presentation is set for 11:35 a.m. CT (12:35 p.m. ET).

news.headline: Stratus Properties refinances Jones Crossing in Texas with $24M loan, lowering interest rate and boosting cash.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Stratus Properties Inc. (NASDAQ: STRS) has successfully closed a $24.0 million non-recourse loan to refinance the existing loan for the retail property at Jones Crossing. This development is a mixed-use project in College Station, Texas, which is home to Texas A&M University. The new loan has a maturity date of April 1, 2028, offering a lower interest rate compared to the previous loan. As a result of this refinancing, Stratus received approximately net cash proceeds.

news.headline: Private ETF sees limited inflows despite efforts, as reported on 03/13/25 by Bloomberg.
news.summary: In recent data released, it was revealed that the unemployment rate fell to 5.2%, with the economy adding 235,000 jobs in the last month. Wages also saw an increase of 3.9% compared to last year. This positive trend indicates a strengthening labor market and growing confidence in the economy. Furthermore, the report highlighted a rise in consumer spending by 0.6% in the last quarter, contributing to the overall growth of the economy. Overall, these statistics point towards a favorable outlook for both job seekers and businesses in the current economic climate.

news.headline: Cra-Z-Art responds to tariffs by boosting toy manufacturing in the USA to accelerate domestic expansion. Celebrating 100th anniversary in 2023, Cra-Z-Art plans significant increase in manufacturing.
news.summary: A company called Cra-Z-Art, based in Randolph, N.J., with a history dating back to 1923, has revealed its intent to boost toy production within the United States. This company, marking its 100th anniversary in 2023, is well-known for its role as a top manufacturer and pioneer in the toy, art, activity, and school supply sectors. The decision to ramp up toy manufacturing operations is significant, reflecting their commitment to expansion and meeting heightened demand for their products. The move underscores their dedication to strengthening their presence in the market and their drive to capitalize on growth opportunities.

news.headline: Mach Natural Resources LP reported Q4 2024 results, with $22 million reduction in interest expense for increased cash flow.
news.summary: In Oklahoma City, Mach Natural Resources LP (NYSE: MNR) shared its financial and operational outcomes for the periods ending December 31, 2024. The company announced a positive adjustment in its projected free cash flow for 2025 by reducing its interest expense midpoint by $22 million. Key highlights from the fourth quarter of 2024 include achieving a total net production of 86.7 thousand barrels of oil equivalent per day ("Mboe/d"). The company also managed to decrease its lease operating expenses during this period.

news.headline: Shuttle Pharma closed $5.75M offering, selling 19.1M shares at $0.30 each to improve outcomes for cancer patients.
news.summary: In Gaithersburg, Maryland, on March 13, 2025, Shuttle Pharmaceuticals Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: SHPH), known as Shuttle Pharma, a specialty pharmaceutical company in the research and development phase, dedicated to enhancing outcomes for cancer patients undergoing radiation therapy (RT), has recently completed a public offering. The offering comprised 19,166,667 shares of common stock (or pre-funded warrants for common stock) at a price of $0.30 per share, resulting in total gross proceeds of approximately $5.75 million for Shuttle Pharma, excluding underwriting discounts, commissions, and other associated expenses.

news.headline: Company to liquidate 2 ETFs (bitcoin & ethereum futures) to align with market dynamics, clients' needs & digital assets.
news.summary: On March 13, 2025, 21Shares US LLC revealed the planned closure of two cryptocurrency exchange-traded funds (ETFs). These funds, focused on bitcoin futures and ethereum futures, are part of the firm's initiative to adjust its product offerings according to market changes, client requirements, and the evolving digital assets sector. 21Shares US LLC is a subsidiary of 21Shares AG, a prominent issuer of ETFs related to cryptocurrencies.

news.headline: Stocks dip 10% as tariff fears weigh. S&P 500 nears correction territory from Feb high amid trade uncertainty.
news.summary: Investors are on edge as the S&P 500 approaches a correction, standing at a 10% decline from its peak in February. Uncertainty surrounding tariffs and trade negotiations continues to unsettle markets, with investors closely monitoring developments.
